title: Number Maximization
description:
Everybody likes larger numbers since they come across as more powerful, more money, etc.

Given a number, determine the largest number that can be formed using the exact same digits as the given number.
input: There is only one input line; it contains an integer between 0 and 999,999 (inclusive). Assume that the input number will not have leading 0’s. Note, however, that the input can be just the value 0.
output: Print the largest number that can be formed using the exact same digits as the input number.
source: University, University of Central Florida, 2022 Local Programming Contest (Final Round)
